title: RapidMeta Neurology | ATTR Polyneuropathy NMA (Patisiran + Vutrisiran + Eplontersen) v1.0
hero_h2: Disease-Modifying Therapy for Hereditary Transthyretin Amyloid Polyneuropathy

pico.pop: Adults with hereditary transthyretin amyloid polyneuropathy (hATTR-PN), stage 1-2, with confirmed pathogenic TTR variant
pico.int: Hepatic-TTR-knockdown therapy: patisiran 0.3 mg/kg IV every 3 weeks (APOLLO; double-stranded siRNA in lipid nanoparticle), vutrisiran 25 mg SC every 3 months (HELIOS-A; conjugated siRNA), or eplontersen 45 mg SC monthly (NEURO-TTRansform; ligand-conjugated antisense oligonucleotide)
pico.comp: Placebo (APOLLO direct comparator) or external placebo arm from APOLLO / NEURO-TTR (used as historical control in HELIOS-A and NEURO-TTRansform per regulatory designs)
pico.out: Change in modified Neuropathy Impairment Score +7 (mNIS+7) from baseline to month 18 (APOLLO, HELIOS-A) or week 65 (NEURO-TTRansform); mean difference vs placebo (negative = better)
pico.subgroup: TTR variant (V30M vs non-V30M), baseline NIS, Coutinho stage, age at onset, sex

real_data_entries.name: APOLLO
real_data_entries.group: Patisiran 0.3 mg/kg IV Q3W vs placebo, hereditary ATTR-PN; primary mNIS+7 change at month 18 (mean difference vs placebo)

allOutcomes.title: mNIS+7 change at month 18 (primary, MD patisiran minus placebo; negative favours treatment)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Adams D et al. NEJM 2018;379:11-21 (APOLLO patisiran).

real_data_entries.name: HELIOS-A
real_data_entries.group: Vutrisiran 25 mg SC Q3M vs APOLLO external placebo, hereditary ATTR-PN; primary mNIS+7 change at month 18

allOutcomes.title: mNIS+7 change at month 18 (primary, MD vutrisiran minus APOLLO placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Adams D et al. Amyloid 2023 / NEJM 2022 (HELIOS-A vutrisiran).

real_data_entries.name: NEURO-TTRansform
real_data_entries.group: Eplontersen 45 mg SC monthly vs NEURO-TTR external placebo, hereditary ATTR-PN; primary mNIS+7 change at week 65

allOutcomes.title: mNIS+7 change at week 65 (primary, MD eplontersen minus external placebo)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Coelho T et al. JAMA 2023;330:1448-1458 (NEURO-TTRansform eplontersen).
